aleabit.layer_label: specialty power supplies for semi / PV
aleabit.verdict_label: RF/DC power for semi process tools — narrow chokepoint
aleabit.thesis: RF and DC specialty power supplies for semiconductor process equipment (etch, PVD, CVD), plus PV and sapphire growth. Direct analogue of Advanced Energy Industries. As domestic etch/CVD tools scale (NAURA, AMEC), Yingjie's RF generator becomes a critical sub-assembly with very few qualified Chinese alternatives. Real chokepoint, small enough to matter.
